about.subtitle: Get To Know
about.title: About Me
about.bio1: A Business Management graduate who decided to embark on a new career path in web development. I've always been fascinated by technology, so when I started learning more about web development, I was hooked right away.
about.bio2: I began my web development journey in 2021 by learning on my own before enrolling in a Full Stack Web Development program at Purwadhika Digital Technology School, where I gained practical experience with a variety of front-end and back-end technologies that emphasize real-world projects simulating industry scenarios.
about.bio3: I also gained hands-on experience building robust and scalable web APIs, working with databases, handling authentication and security, implementing efficient server-side architecture, crafting responsive and visually appealing user interfaces, integrating APIs, handling user interactions, and optimizing web performance.
